counters.description: lvl 1 trades arent worth it unless in minion wave walk away to reset her vital rush bramble 1st back use your w and pretend to auto to bait her parry then sidestep and now combo the shit out of her. hug walls when she ults she will outscale you in the split but youre a teamfighting tank machine so just shove the waves and wait for a tp teamfight.

kite her q2 and poke with w. give prio for waves until level 3. w her e if she engages you and stay away from her w sweetspot. wait out her passive ornn does not have the damage to break it.at 6 she will dodge your ult with hers so walk back when you cast it and keep her out of range. anathema and tabis reduces her true damage and are useful to fight her in splitpush or in teamfights with anathema

dangerous lvl 1 focus on short trades and sidestepping her q dont w when her stacks are full because she will melt you with q. dueling her after 1st item is almost impossible due to her insane damage but shes useless in teamfights if you can land really really good cc on her shes a counter and a rough one at that so you just focus on laning perfectly and teamfighting perfectly and you should win.... it really isnt a fun matchup.

try to dodge her e or w it and bully the fuck out of her lvl 1 and back off into tower when she has 4 stacks if shes good you just perma farm and try to survive and keep wave on your side never fight on her side
dodge the game
cheese lane just farm and dont hit him hell just heal

you wont really have kill potential until lvl 6 just try to punish her by staying in bushes so she wastes a ward to auto to farm and punish her offensive qs by doing your bread and butter combo and focus her down in teamfights but using the bushes is the most important part of the lane

i personally love this matchup its very fun. as all darius matchups let the wave push to you and you can begin comboing him after lvl 3 you gotta q w and e away thats your bread and butter or when hes chasing you or just melee range w his e so you deny his e q guranteed heal. you outscale him so its not a problem if you dont try to fight him
rush bramble thornmail evenshroud and combo him sidestep his w or just facetank it and trade with him easy matchup and walk forward everytime he does 1st q and walk away when he 2nd qs. very hard

really hard skill matchup if he has temp you lose level 1 if he has conq you win. w his q3 and try to actually q w it for more damage but you have to be really fast and reactive flash out of his e q3 r combo it does a lot of damage. punish his 22 second e cd its really long.
kite in minions dont let him q you and w his cc. try to survive the lane.
kite him keep trades short and dont let him ult your ult
be super aggressive he hyper outscales you always auto attack him and just try to kill him with q and e. dont ult or do a risky e if his pool his up.

dont stay near walls and walk away from him when he has his passive stacks up. wait for his shield to drop before damaging him and fight him at 6 by doing q r e r w combo when he goes for cs or just straight up ult him to win the trade hard

you win pre 6 and theres one trick to this matchup when you ult hes gonna try to ult you right well you can just not press ult and press w instead you deny him his r and you have the advantage of doing damage with both abilites 2>0 and he has a brittle proc or walk away until the ram catches up and your trades before lvl 5 should look something like q e auto run away hes gonna e and you w back at him and auto and you keep running.
only fight him in mini gnar and w his ult when he engages on you  try to combo him while hes farming. let him have prio at first levels and just try to poke him down with qs and w

dont get hit too much from his q hide in bushes and make sure your dshield passive regen stays up the whole time dont eat his q endlessly. farm until you can q and combo him into oblivion or just farm and scale you wont really have much kill potential against a gankplank who knows the matchup
very annoying lane walk into her when she casts her q similiar to darius q. hold your w when she has ult up you can cancel it if you w at the last second of the drowsy
stick near walls for e knockup and do only short trades do not trade autos. w when his stun is about to end and spam all your abilities and run. always do short trades near walls and he never wins
buy warmogs and try to farm you wont get kill potential on a good cassio if you ult her walk back so she cant w or ult it to stop you
even matchup just farm and w her knockup not her stun short trades and ult if she ults to deny her stronger all in

stay away from walls and move away from wave when he qs. abuse him with your own q when he goes for cs. try to setup a q r e r w combo in your side of the lane. you outscale akshan so going even is not the worst.

pay attention to his sword and make sure it doesn't pass through you. do not fight him level 1-5 just cs until you get ult then you can all in him and stomp trades. do not auto attack when he w's your brittle just wait it out and click at the last second it will be enough time for your brittle to proc and stay activated just click at the last second.
hard skill matchup play around walls and his windwall cd max w it does the most damage and youre never hitting a yasuo with q anyway so sit at walls for knockups

do not push into kayle similar to nasus matchup she scales super super hard but so do you. punish her everytime she goes for any cs and only do ability trades no auto attack trades unless she is really really low.
stick near tower and rush mercs. poke him as much as you can.

dont fight him level 1-4 hes really really strong early and can kill you easily. play with the waves and you should be fine. stick to walls to cc when he engages and always keep him in fog of war to cancel his ults or tps.
try to get prio level 1 if he leashes but if you leash its kinda doomed lane and you wont have kill opportunity until level 5 so go leashless and get prio by hitting caster minions.
